raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr tee Israëliterti ne
fadedſinaja nekahdus Pilsfahtus/
kas Pakalnds stahweja/ bes ween
Azoru fadedſinaja Josuüs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſu Laupijumu tcho
Pilsfahtu/ un wiſſus Lohpus
laupija tee Israëka Behrni
preekſch fewis/ bet wiſſus Zilwe-
fus apkawe tee ar Sohbixa Af-
mini/ teekams tee tohs nomaita-
ja/ tee ne atlizzinaja ne weenu/
kam Dwaicha bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ittin ka tas KUNGS
Mohsum fawam Kalpam paweh-
lejs/ ta pawehleja Mohsus Josu-
um/ un ta darrija Josuüs/ wiſch
ne atrahwe ne Wahrdtu no wiſſa/
fo tas KUNGS Mohsum bij
pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta uhsjehme Josuüs wiſ-
fu ſcho Semmi/ tohs Kalnus un
wiſſu/ kas prett Deenas-Widdu
gull/ wiſſit Gosenka Semmi/ un
tahs Eeleiſaſ/ un to Klaijumu/
un tohs Israëka Kalnus ar fa-
wahm Eeleijahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No ta Ablaka Kalna/ kas
us angſchn lihds Seirei ſteeſpjahs/
lihds Baäl-Gadam/ eekſch ta Lib-
banus-Klatjuma/ us appakſchu
pee ta Ermoza Kalna/ wiſch
guhſtija arridsan wiſſus winno
Rehnixus/ kawe tohs/ un noka-
we tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ilgu Laiku karroja Josu-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne weens Pilsfahts bija
kas ar Labbu buhtu Israëtan-
padewees/ ka ween tee Eewiteri
kas Gibeoxxa dshwoja/ wiſſi
usjehme tee ar Karrofchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas bija no ta KUD-
GA/ ka tee fawu Sirđi apzee-
naja/ ka tee Israëtam pretti ga-
Karrā/ tadcht ka wiſch tohs i-
deldetu/ ka teem ne kahda Sche-
lastiba notiktn/ bet ka wiſch to-
nomaitatu/ittin ka tas KUNG-
Mohsum bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika nahze Jos-
us/ un isfaknoja tohs Eenakim-
teem Kalneem/no Eebrona/no D-
bira/no Ahnaba no wiſſeim Ju-
da Kalneem/ un no wiſſeim Is-
etā Kalneem/ un Josuüs isdelde-
tohs ar wiſſo Pilsfahteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne weens no teein Een-
kim tappe atlizzinahts eekſch
fraëka Behrnu Semmes/ ka we-
Gasā/ Gada/ un Asdoda/ ka-
pahri palikke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta usjehme Josuüs wiſ-
to Semmi/ pehz wiſſu/ fo ta-
KUNGS us Mohsu bij ru-
najs/ un Josuüs dewe to Isra-
tam par eemantojamu Teefi-
pehz fawahm Dallischahm-
pehz fawahm Ziltim/un ta Sen-
me mittejahs no Karrofchanas.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
